technology.title: ‘Terrified!’: Chinese man spends US$28 to look like Jensen Huang, garners large following
technology.summary: A young man in rural China has gained tens of thousands of online followers in two weeks by impersonating Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang. Yang Yang, 28, who lives in a village in Dandong in northeastern Liaoning province, has gone viral on social media for his videos showing him imitating the artificial intelligence (AI) titan. He released the clips using an account called @huangyinxun, which is how Huang’s Chinese name is pronounced in the northeastern China dialect. Yang has shared over 20 clips...

briefing.news_focus: A young man in rural China has gained tens of thousands of online followers in two weeks by impersonating Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang. Yang Yang, 28, who lives in a village in Dandong in northeastern Liaoning province, has gone viral on social media for his videos showing him imitating the artificial intelligence (AI) titan. He released the clips using an account called @huangyinxun, which is how Huang’s Chinese name is pronounced in the northeastern China dialect. Yang has shared over 20 clips...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 一名來自中國遼寧省丹東的28歲男子楊楊，花費28美元模仿Nvidia首席執行官黃仁勳，並在短短兩週內在社交媒體上獲得了數萬名追隨者。他透過一個名為@huangyinxun的帳號發布了超過20段模仿黃仁勳的影片，這個名稱是黃仁勳中文名字在東北方言中的發音，因而吸引了大量關注。
briefing.background: 隨著人工智慧技術的迅速發展，Nvidia作為該領域的領導者，其首席執行官黃仁勳的形象也日益受到關注。特別是在中國，AI技術的推廣與應用引發了廣泛的社會興趣，許多年輕人對於科技領袖的模仿與崇拜現象層出不窮。此外，社交媒體的普及使得這類模仿行為能迅速獲得關注，形成一種新的網絡文化現象。
briefing.analysis: 楊楊的行為反映了中國年輕一代對於科技與創新領袖的崇拜，並且借助社交媒體平台的力量，迅速聚集了大量粉絲。這種模仿行為不僅是對黃仁勳個人魅力的認可，也顯示出當代年輕人對於AI技術的熱情與追求。隨著社交媒體的影響力不斷增強，類似的模仿現象可能會在其他科技領袖中出現，進一步促進科技文化的傳播與交流。此事件也可能引發對於科技領袖形象的討論，尤其是在中國這樣一個科技快速發展的國家。

technology.title: Anthropic has officially filed to go public
technology.summary: After months of speculation about whether OpenAI or Anthropic would be first in their race to IPO, Anthropic on Monday reached a key milestone: filing to kick off the process with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The filing sets the stage for what's sure to be a massive IPO. As of its fundraise last […]

briefing.news_focus: After months of speculation about whether OpenAI or Anthropic would be first in their race to IPO, Anthropic on Monday reached a key milestone: filing to kick off the process with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The filing sets the stage for what's sure to be a massive IPO. As of its fundraise last […]
briefing.news_focus_zh: Anthropic於週一正式向美國證券交易委員會提交了公開上市的申請，這標誌著其IPO進程的重要里程碑。此舉結束了關於Anthropic與OpenAI誰將率先上市的猜測，並為即將到來的IPO鋪平了道路。
briefing.background: Anthropic是一家專注於大型語言模型的人工智慧公司，近年來迅速崛起，並吸引了多家頂級企業客戶的關注。儘管在AI領域中曾被視為弱者，但其技術的進步和市場需求的增長使其成為一個強大的競爭者。隨著AI技術的普及，許多公司都在尋求進一步的資金來擴展業務，公開上市成為一個重要的資金來源選擇。
briefing.analysis: Anthropic的IPO申請顯示出其在AI市場中的強勁增長和潛力，這對於投資者來說是一個吸引人的機會。與此同時，OpenAI也在考慮上市，這使得兩者之間的競爭更加激烈。根據參考報導，Anthropic的成功吸引了多家企業客戶，這可能會進一步提升其市場地位。未來，若IPO順利，Anthropic將能夠獲得更多資金來加速其技術開發和市場擴展，進一步挑戰OpenAI的領導地位。各方利益相關者，包括投資者、企業客戶及競爭對手，都將密切關注此次IPO的進展。

supporting_summaries: Anthropic, now an AI powerhouse that has landed top-tier enterprise customers, was once considered an underdog in the emerging world of large language models.

technology.title: UK banks blocked from cyber AI tool Mythos get offer from rival OpenAI
technology.summary: Nine banks have been offered access to GPT 5.5 Cyber, as fierce rival Anthropic has blocked previews of its tool.

briefing.news_focus: Nine banks have been offered access to GPT 5.5 Cyber, as fierce rival Anthropic has blocked previews of its tool.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 九家英國銀行因為競爭對手Anthropic的阻擋，無法使用其網絡安全AI工具Mythos，隨後獲得了OpenAI的GPT 5.5 Cyber的使用權。這一事件突顯了科技公司之間的激烈競爭，特別是在金融科技領域。
briefing.background: 在當前數位化迅速發展的背景下，金融機構越來越依賴先進的人工智慧技術來強化其網絡安全防護。Anthropic作為AI領域的重要參與者，其推出的Mythos工具被視為提升銀行安全性的重要資源。然而，該工具的預覽被阻擋，可能是出於商業競爭考量，導致這些銀行尋求其他解決方案。OpenAI則透過提供其最新的GPT 5.5 Cyber，進一步擴大其在金融科技市場的影響力。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件顯示出AI技術在金融行業的重要性以及各大科技公司之間的競爭態勢。Anthropic的阻擋行為可能反映出其對市場份額的保護意圖，而OpenAI則藉此機會吸引更多銀行客戶，增強其市場地位。這一動態可能促使其他科技公司重新評估其產品策略，並加速開發更具競爭力的AI工具。此外，銀行在選擇合作夥伴時，將更加謹慎考量技術的可用性及其背後的商業策略，未來可能出現更多類似的競爭與合作模式。

politics.title: Ben Roberts-Smith won’t see full brief of war crime allegations for months – as it happened
politics.summary: This blog is now closed Get our breaking news email , free app or daily news podcast The foreign minister, Penny Wong , has announced new sanctions by the commonwealth over three Israeli individuals and four entities in response to “escalating settler violence against Palestinians in the West Bank”. The entities will receive targeted financial sanctions while the individuals will receive travel bans to Australia. For the first time, designated entities now include farming outposts that serve as hubs for settler violence. Settler violence is used to displace Palestinians and perpetuate the settlement enterprise, through destruction of property, displacement of families, beatings, sexual assault, and torture, resulting in serious injuries and deaths. This is another beat up. It’s not unusual in tax legislation for the definitions to be settled in what’s called legislative instruments. Continue reading...

This is another beat up. It’s not unusual in tax legislation for the definitions to be settled in what’s called legislative instruments. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 澳洲外交部長彭妮·黃宣布對三名以色列個人及四個實體實施新制裁，以回應約旦河西岸日益嚴重的定居者暴力行為。這些制裁包括針對實體的財務制裁和對個人的旅行禁令。此次制裁首次將農業前哨納入制裁範圍，這些前哨被指控成為定居者暴力的中心，並用以驅逐巴勒斯坦人，造成財產損失、家庭流離失所及人身傷害等嚴重後果。
briefing.background: 近年來，以色列在約旦河西岸的定居活動持續擴大，導致巴勒斯坦社區面臨日益嚴重的暴力與侵害。國際社會對以色列的定居政策表達了強烈關切，並多次呼籲停止這些行為。澳洲政府在此背景下，選擇對相關個人及實體採取制裁措施，顯示其對人權問題的重視及對巴勒斯坦人權益的支持。這些制裁措施反映了澳洲在國際政治中對以色列政策的立場，並試圖透過經濟手段來促進地區和平。
briefing.analysis: 此次制裁措施的推出，顯示了澳洲政府對於以色列定居者暴力行為的零容忍態度，並試圖透過制裁來施加壓力，促使以色列政府改變其政策。然而，這一舉措可能會引發以色列政府的強烈反對，並可能影響澳洲與以色列的外交關係。支持巴勒斯坦的國際社會可能會對此表示讚賞，但也可能引發對於澳洲在中東政策的更廣泛討論。未來幾個月內，澳洲政府如何應對來自以色列及其支持者的反應，將成為觀察的重點。

politics.title: Israel kills five in attacks on Lebanon after Trump announces de-escalation
politics.summary: The deadly attacks raise concerns about the reported agreement on the cessation of hostilities.

briefing.news_focus: The deadly attacks raise concerns about the reported agreement on the cessation of hostilities.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 以色列在黎巴嫩發動攻擊，造成五人死亡，此舉引發對於特朗普宣布的降級協議的擔憂。這一事件發生在緊張局勢加劇的背景下，顯示出地區衝突的持續性與複雜性。
briefing.background: 以色列與黎巴嫩之間的緊張關係由來已久，尤其是與真主黨的衝突。近期，隨著特朗普政府試圖促進中東和平進程，對於停火協議的期待有所增加。然而，地區內的武裝衝突並未因此減少，反而可能因為各方的軍事行動而加劇。以色列軍方在此背景下對黎巴嫩的攻擊，顯示出其對潛在威脅的高度警覺，並且可能反映出對於停火協議的懷疑。
briefing.analysis: 以色列的攻擊行動可能是對黎巴嫩境內發射的疑似火箭彈的直接回應，這一點在參考報導中有補充說明，指出以色列軍方攔截了來自黎巴嫩的飛行物。此舉不僅顯示出以色列對於國土安全的重視，也可能是對於特朗普政府降級呼籲的挑戰。各方在此事件中的立場可能存在分歧，以色列強調自衛權，而黎巴嫩則可能指責以色列的行動為侵略。未來局勢可能因為持續的軍事衝突而變得更加不穩定，特別是在停火協議的執行上。

supporting_titles: Israel military says intercepted projectiles from Lebanon
supporting_summaries: Israel military said it identified a “suspicious aerial target” that later fell in Israeli territory near the Lebanese border

politics.title: First Thing: Defense department bars reporters from Pentagon press room
politics.summary: Spokesperson claims Trump administration has ‘the most transparent war department in history’ despite ban on journalists using Pentagon facility. Also, more than 1,000 Marilyn Monroes descend on Palm Springs Don’t already get First Thing in your inbox? Sign up here Good morning. In another apparent affront to press freedom from the Trump administration, journalists may no longer enter the Pentagon’s press office , which has been designated as a classified space. How ha ve the media reacted? After the defense department announced sweeping restrictions in October, many longtime reporters refused to agree and began turning over their press passes. The department then announced a “next generation of the Pentagon press corps” featuring 60 journalists from far-right outlets. The New York Times sued the Pentagon over those policies, which designated journalists as “security risks”, and a federal judge found in the Times’s favor in March. What is making the fund controversial? The terms of the fund do not require the disclosure of how much is paid to whom. Chuck Schumer, the US Senate minority leader, said: “Trump’s nearly $2bn Maga slush fund is his most brazen act of self-dealing yet and one of the most corrupt schemes ever launched by a president.” Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Spokesperson claims Trump administration has ‘the most transparent war department in history’ despite ban on journalists using Pentagon facility. Also, more than 1,000 Marilyn Monroes descend on Palm Springs Don’t already get First Thing in your inbox? Sign up here Good morning. In another apparent affront to press freedom from the Trump administration, journalists may no longer enter the Pentagon’s press office , which has been designated as a classified space. How ha ve the media reacted? After the defense department announced sweeping restrictions in October, many longtime reporters refused to agree and began turning over their press passes. The department then announced a “next generation of the Pentagon press corps” featuring 60 journalists from far-right outlets. The New York Times sued the Pentagon over those policies, which designated journalists as “security risks”, and a federal judge found in the Times’s favor in March. What is making the fund controversial? The terms of the fund do not require the disclosure of how much is paid to whom. Chuck Schumer, the US Senate minority leader, said: “Trump’s nearly $2bn Maga slush fund is his most brazen act of self-dealing yet and one of the most corrupt schemes ever launched by a president.” Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國國防部宣布禁止記者進入五角大樓的新聞辦公室，該辦公室現在被指定為機密空間。儘管國防部發言人聲稱特朗普政府是歷史上最透明的戰爭部門，但此舉被視為對新聞自由的又一次挑戰。隨著限制措施的實施，許多記者拒絕接受新規定並交回記者證，導致國防部推出一個新的記者團隊，該團隊主要由極右派媒體的記者組成。
briefing.background: 五角大樓的新聞辦公室長期以來是記者與國防部之間的重要聯繫點。然而，隨著特朗普政府的上任，對媒體的限制逐漸增加。國防部在十月宣布的限制措施引發了廣泛的反彈，許多資深記者選擇交回記者證以示抗議。此舉被認為是對新聞自由的直接威脅，並引發了《紐約時報》的訴訟，該報在三月獲得了有利判決，認為國防部的政策不當地將記者標記為“安全風險”。
briefing.analysis: 國防部的這一決定引發了多方反應。支持政府的媒體可能會迎合這一政策，認為這是保護國家安全的必要措施，而反對派則將其視為對新聞自由的侵犯。參考報導指出，國防部發言人強調此舉並不具爭議性，因為該空間現在由使用機密資料的文案撰寫者佔用。這一點與《紐約時報》的訴訟形成對比，後者強調了記者在民主社會中的重要性。隨著對媒體的限制加劇，未來可能會出現更多的法律挑戰和社會反響，進一步影響政府與媒體之間的關係。

supporting_titles: Pentagon bars journalists from its press office, saying it has become a ’classified space’
EDITORIAL: Do not ignore AI boom risks
supporting_summaries: Acting Pentagon press secretary Joel Valdez confirmed the move, saying there was “nothing controversial” about it and that it came because speechwriters, who use classified material, were now occupying the space

economy.title: Ex-Federal Reserve chair Jerome Powell sounds alarm over political interference
economy.summary: Powell says central bank has been facing ‘stress test’ under Trump, as supreme court weighs decision on Fed governor that president tried to fire Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email Jerome Powell , the former chair of the Federal Reserve , has warned that a single act of political interference in monetary policy could permanently destroy public trust in the central bank. As Donald Trump’s administration continues to test the Fed’s longstanding independence, Powell said in a speech on Sunday night that the institution was in the midst of a “stress test”. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Powell says central bank has been facing ‘stress test’ under Trump, as supreme court weighs decision on Fed governor that president tried to fire Sign up for the Breaking News US newsletter email Jerome Powell , the former chair of the Federal Reserve , has warned that a single act of political interference in monetary policy could permanently destroy public trust in the central bank. As Donald Trump’s administration continues to test the Fed’s longstanding independence, Powell said in a speech on Sunday night that the institution was in the midst of a “stress test”. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 前美國聯邦儲備委員會主席鮑威爾警告，政治干預可能會永久摧毀公眾對中央銀行的信任。他指出，在特朗普政府的影響下，聯儲正面臨一場「壓力測試」。這一言論是在特朗普試圖解雇聯儲官員的背景下發表的，最高法院目前正在考慮相關的法律問題。
briefing.background: 美國聯邦儲備系統作為中央銀行，長期以來被視為獨立於政治的機構，旨在制定貨幣政策以促進經濟穩定。然而，特朗普政府的政策和行為對聯儲的獨立性提出了挑戰，特別是在任命和解雇官員方面。這種干預可能導致市場對聯儲的信任下降，進而影響其政策有效性和經濟穩定性。鮑威爾的警告反映了對這一情況的擔憂，尤其是在通脹和經濟增長的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 鮑威爾的警告突顯了政治干預對中央銀行獨立性的重要性，這一觀點在經濟學界廣泛認同。特朗普政府的行為可能會引發市場的不安，投資者對未來的貨幣政策走向感到不確定。參考報導中提到的特朗普提名的官員凱文·沃什，曾被視為通脹鷹派，但其立場似乎隨著政治環境的變化而改變，這進一步顯示了政治影響對聯儲政策的潛在影響。各方對於聯儲獨立性的看法存在分歧，支持者認為應保持其獨立性以確保經濟穩定，而反對者則可能認為政治干預有助於更好地反映民意。

supporting_titles: What will Kevin Warsh’s Federal Reserve look like?
supporting_summaries: Donald Trump’s nominee was an inflation hawk—until he wasn’t

economy.title: UK house prices fall for first time this year amid rising mortgage rates
economy.summary: Nationwide finds typical price was £278,024 in May, as Savills says Iran war has ‘fundamentally changed’ outlook Business live – latest updates House prices fell in the UK for the first time this year in May, as rising interest rates triggered by the war in Iran hurt homebuyer demand. The price of the average UK home dropped 0.6% in May compared with the month before, according to the lender Nationwide. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Nationwide finds typical price was £278,024 in May, as Savills says Iran war has ‘fundamentally changed’ outlook Business live – latest updates House prices fell in the UK for the first time this year in May, as rising interest rates triggered by the war in Iran hurt homebuyer demand. The price of the average UK home dropped 0.6% in May compared with the month before, according to the lender Nationwide. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國房價在今年五月首次出現下跌，根據Nationwide的數據，平均房價為278,024英鎊，較前一個月下降了0.6%。這一下跌主要是受到伊朗戰爭引發的利率上升影響，進而削弱了購房者的需求。
briefing.background: 近期英國的經濟環境受到多重因素影響，特別是全球地緣政治的變化。伊朗戰爭的爆發導致市場對未來經濟的不確定性增加，進而推高了利率。隨著利率上升，貸款成本也隨之增加，這使得潛在購房者的購買力受到壓制。此外，英國的通脹壓力也在影響消費者的信心，進一步抑制了房地產市場的活躍度。
briefing.analysis: 英國房價的下跌反映了市場對未來經濟形勢的擔憂。購房者面對更高的貸款利率，購房需求自然減少，這可能導致房地產市場進一步放緩。房地產開發商和投資者將密切關注市場動態，以調整其策略以應對不斷變化的環境。此外，若利率持續上升，可能會引發更大範圍的經濟影響，包括消費支出減少和經濟增長放緩。這一情況也可能促使政府考慮採取相應的政策措施來穩定市場。

economy.title: French navy boards Russia-linked oil tanker in Atlantic – video
economy.summary: France has released footage that appears to show French naval commandos boarding a ship suspected of being part of Russia's 'shadow fleet' and subject to international sanctions. The French president, Emmanuel Macron, said the operation took place on the tanker, named the Tagor, with support of the UK and in strict compliance with the law of the sea. The French navy confirmed the interception occurred on Sunday Macron says French navy has boarded Russia-linked oil tanker in Atlantic Continue reading...

The French president, Emmanuel Macron, said the operation took place on the tanker, named the Tagor, with support of the UK and in strict compliance with the law of the sea. The French navy confirmed the interception occurred on Sunday Macron says French navy has boarded Russia-linked oil tanker in Atlantic Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 法國海軍於大西洋攔截了一艘疑似與俄羅斯有關的油輪，該油輪名為Tagor，並受到國際制裁。法國總統馬克宏表示，此次行動在英國的支持下進行，並嚴格遵循海洋法。法國海軍確認此次攔截發生在上週日，並釋放了相關的視頻畫面。
briefing.background: 隨著俄烏衝突的持續，西方國家對俄羅斯實施了一系列經濟制裁，旨在削弱其能源收入。俄羅斯的“影子艦隊”是指那些試圖繞過制裁，繼續運輸石油的船隻。這些行動不僅影響了全球能源市場，也對俄羅斯的經濟造成了壓力。法國的此次行動顯示出其在國際制裁執行中的主動性，並強調了與英國的合作關係。
briefing.analysis: 法國此次攔截行動反映出其在國際制裁執行中的積極角色，並可能引發俄羅斯的強烈反應。根據參考報導，西方國家正試圖削弱俄羅斯的石油收入，這一行動可能有助於進一步打擊俄羅斯的經濟基礎。不同報導的重點在於，The Economist強調了西方國家對俄羅斯影子艦隊的打擊行動及其對油收的影響，而The Guardian則更專注於具體的軍事行動和法律依據。未來，隨著制裁的加強，可能會出現更多類似的攔截行動，並引發國際間的緊張局勢。
